basic_details.job_title: DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Ranipet (DCPU Ranipet)
basic_details.short_information: District Child Protection Unit Ranipet (DCPU Ranipet) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 03-08-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University, Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation / implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development / Social Welfare, Proficiency in Computers
qualification.details: Post Graduate degree in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University. OR Graduate in Social Work / Sociology / Child Development / Human Rights / Public Administration / Psychology / Psychiatry / Law / Public Health / Community Resource Management from a recognized University with 2 years experience in project formulation / implementation, monitoring and supervision preferably in the field of Women & Child Development / Social Welfare. Proficiency in Computers.

physical_eligibility.details: Candidates should download and read the DCPU Ranipet Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. | Download DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) Job 2026 Notification PDF

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DCPU Ranipet Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) posts is 03-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) position by DCPU Ranipet.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate degree or a Graduate degree with 2 years of experience in a relevant field, along with computer proficiency.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this recruitment is 42 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Protection Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 27,804/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Protection Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment primarily involves Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Ranipet, which is https://ranipet.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Protection Officer (Non-Institutional Care) post is on a contractual basis.
